query: How many goals did Manchester City score in EPL 2021-22?

baseline_result.query: How many goals did Manchester City score in EPL 2021-22?
baseline_result.sql:
SELECT COALESCE(
                    SUM(
                        CASE WHEN home_team_id IN (?) THEN home_goals ELSE 0 END +
                        CASE WHEN away_team_id IN (?) THEN away_goals ELSE 0 END
                    ),
                    0
                )
                FROM matches
                WHERE comp_id IN (?)
                AND (
                        home_team_id IN (?)
                        OR
                        away_team_id IN (?)
                )

columns:
COALESCE(
                    SUM(
                        CASE WHEN home_team_id IN (?) THEN home_goals ELSE 0 END +
                        CASE WHEN away_team_id IN (?) THEN away_goals ELSE 0 END
                    ),
                    0
                )

full_result.sql:
SELECT COALESCE(
                SUM(
                    CASE WHEN home_team_id IN (?) THEN home_goals ELSE 0 END +
                    CASE WHEN away_team_id IN (?) THEN away_goals ELSE 0 END
                ),
                0
            )
            FROM matches
            WHERE comp_id IN (?)
            AND (
                    home_team_id IN (?)
                    OR
                    away_team_id IN (?)
            )
